summary: Scrutiny for audit-and-target-model was overridden after the test gate failed only on documented pre-existing edge-worker assertion suites unrelated to the audit artifact or temp-home isolation fixes. Typecheck and lint passed, and the temp-log permission blockers were removed.

test.details: pnpm test:packages:run -- --maxWorkers=8 still fails only on pre-existing packages/edge-worker assertion suites (feedback-delivery, feedback-timeout, screenshot-upload-hooks, runner-selection).

override.reason: Mission AGENTS.md already documents these edge-worker failures as unrelated pre-existing validation noise. The audit milestone only changed mission artifacts and test temp-home isolation, and those changes validated cleanly in targeted tests.
